name: Foot in the Fire Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Sift flour and sugar, set aside. In a saucepan, bring the margarine, cocoa, and water to a boil; remove from heat. In a large bowl, mix all remaining cake ingredients (buttermilk, eggs). Add the sifted flour mixture and cocoa mixture, stirring well. Bake in a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan for 20 to 30 minutes until a clean toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Check for doneness ten minutes before the indicated baking time.
Prepare frosting: Place margarine, cocoa, and evaporated milk in a saucepan; bring to a boil, then remove from heat. Gradually add the remaining frosting ingredients, stirring continuously until smooth. Frost the cake immediately after removing it from the oven. Allow the cake to cool slightly before cutting if possible. This rich chocolate cake is so delicious, you might eat it with one foot in the fire!
